metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop sophisticated three-dimensional artistic practice through substantial sculptural or installation work. This course emphasizes conceptual development, technical mastery, and preparation for art careers or advanced study.
metadata.general_description: Advanced three-dimensional art course for professional-level sculptural practice.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced three-dimensional artists create sophisticated works demonstrating conceptual depth and technical mastery.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 sculptors develop substantial bodies of work reflecting personal artistic vision and engaging with meaningful concepts.

big_ideas.statement: Sophisticated three-dimensional work integrates concept, form, material, and spatial awareness.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced artists make intentional choices across all dimensions, creating work where form, material, and concept unite meaningfully.

big_ideas.statement: Contemporary three-dimensional art encompasses diverse practices from traditional sculpture to installation and intervention.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 artists explore varied approaches including sculpture, installation, site-specific work, and conceptual three-dimensional practice.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced three-dimensional art practice positions students for art careers or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 artists develop professional portfolios, exhibition experience, and networks necessary for art careers or continued education.

competencies.raw: Create substantial three-dimensional works and bodies of work
i_can_statements: I can conceive and realize substantial sculptural or installation works
I can develop cohesive bodies of related work
I can maintain artistic vision across multiple pieces
I can produce work meeting professional exhibition standards

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated conceptual and thematic work
i_can_statements: I can develop complex artistic concepts and ideas
I can create work with layered meaning and significance
I can explore conceptual depth through form and material
I can create work engaging with meaningful themes

competencies.raw: Master diverse sculptural materials and techniques
i_can_statements: I can work with mastery across multiple materials
I can employ advanced technical approaches
I can innovate with materials and techniques
I can achieve professional technical quality
I can work in diverse three-dimensional forms
I can create installation and site-specific work
I can experiment with unconventional approaches
I can push boundaries of three-dimensional practice

competencies.raw: Analyze three-dimensional art critically and conceptually
i_can_statements: I can conduct detailed analysis of sculptural and installation work
I can understand three-dimensional work within art historical contexts
I can evaluate artistic and conceptual significance
I can assess work against professional standards
I can articulate professional standards for sculpture and installation
I can understand art world and exhibition practices
I can recognize excellence in contemporary three-dimensional art
I can evaluate professional artistic work

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic development and personal voice
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my artistic growth and development
I can articulate my artistic philosophy and approach
I can identify my unique artistic perspective
I can envision art-making as lifelong practice or career

competencies.raw: Understand three-dimensional art's cultural and social dimensions
i_can_statements: I can analyze art's cultural and social significance
I can understand diverse artistic traditions
I can recognize representation and voice in art
I can engage art's role in society and culture

competencies.raw: Document and present three-dimensional work professionally
i_can_statements: I can photograph and document work professionally
I can create video documentation of installations
I can prepare work for exhibition and publication
I can maintain professional documentation

competencies.raw: Present work in exhibition and public contexts
i_can_statements: I can exhibit work professionally
I can install and present work effectively
I can engage audiences with my artistic work
I can participate in curatorial and exhibition processes
I can explain artistic concepts and ideas compellingly
I can write artist statements and project descriptions
I can discuss work with diverse audiences
I can develop artistic narrative and voice

competencies.raw: Communicate through three-dimensional form and space
i_can_statements: I can express complex ideas through sculptural form
I can create work engaging viewers meaningfully
I can use three-dimensional work for social commentary
I can develop distinctive artistic voice

competencies.raw: Engage with diverse sculptural traditions and practices
i_can_statements: I can study three-dimensional art from diverse traditions
I can understand global sculpture and installation practices
I can incorporate diverse influences respectfully
I can appreciate varied approaches to three-dimensional art
I can engage with cutting-edge contemporary practice
I can experiment with emerging technologies and approaches
I can participate in artistic innovation
I can develop work at frontier of three-dimensional art
I can build professional networks in art world
I can establish presence through exhibitions and publications
I can seek mentorship and professional guidance
I can participate in artist communities

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional art practice
i_can_statements: I can identify career goals in three-dimensional art
I can develop plan for professional advancement
I can explore diverse art world opportunities
I can commit to lifelong artistic practice and growth

areas.name: Advanced Sculptural Practice and Development
topics: Conceptualization and artistic vision for major works
Development of substantial bodies of work

areas.name: Form, Space, and Conceptual Development
topics: Scale and proportion in major works

areas.name: Professional Art Practice and Career Development
areas.raw: Professional Art Practice and Career Development
topics: Exhibition and public presentation of work
Understanding art world and career pathways
Grant writing and funding for art projects
